Hector Duval

Person · First seen 3307-12-31 · 3 mentions
Active: 3307-12-31 → 3309-01-16
Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3309-01-16
Princess Aisling Echoes Aegis Reformation Calls
Princess Aisling Duval publicly urges Emperor Arissa Lavigny-Duval to join the Alliance and Federation in reforming Aegis to combat the Thargoid threat.
3308-01-01
Duvals Gather to Celebrate New Year
Princess Aisling Duval hosts a New Year celebration introducing Hadrian Duval and his family to Imperial society.
3307-12-31
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part Four)
Historian Sima Kalhana concludes her 3307 review, covering the Yuri Grom honey trap, Torval family rift, Colonia Bridge, NMLA's final stand, and Salvation's superweapons.
